message.content:
- Tim Cook made his first public appearance in China since the onset of Covid-19 pandemic in late March.
- Cook visited an Apple retail store in Beijing and met privately with high-ranking government officials to discuss the company's operations.
- Cook described the relationship between Apple and China as "symbiotic" at a state-sponsored technology conference.
- He also announced the expansion of a multimillion-dollar rural education program in China.
